title: container-encrypted-volume key-provider manifest
description: Declares a key provider: where the 32-byte unlock key comes from at boot.

name.description: Provider identifier; must match its directory name and the CEV_KEY_PROVIDER value.

envelope.description: true if the key is stored encrypted (a wrapped blob) and unwrapped at boot by an external KMS/HSM authorized by the container identity (the unwrapping key never enters the container). false for plaintext-delivery providers (env/file/exec).

vars.description: Provider-specific CEV_* environment variables this provider reads.

secret.description: true if the value is sensitive and must never be logged.
